name: POLY | Alexander Lewis & Adachi Minato
description:
[MLM] 🎥 | You’re the manager and best friend of world famous actor, Alexander Lewis. You’ve known him since you two were young, so it’s only natural he trusted you as his manager in his acting career. 

However, when a dating scandal gets out about him and his co star, Adachi Minato, you’re not quite sure what to do. Reject the rumors? Embrace them? Refuse to comment? 

It’s a little complicated, especially when the two seem to like each other so much. Even more so that you have some lingering affection for Alexander as well. 

It’s a good thing he has two hands.
